summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of IELTS 17 Test 2 Reading section. All three passages (P1, P2, P3) and all question types are rendering and functioning correctly. Tested: note_completion (Q1-5), true_false_not_given (Q6-13), section_matching (Q14-18), matching_features (Q19-23), sentence_completion (Q24-26), multiple_choice (Q27-31), yes_no_not_given (Q32-36), and summary_completion (Q37-40). All input fields, dropdowns, and radio buttons are working. Header buttons (Settings, Help, Hide) are functional.
critical_code_review_comments: All Reading question types are correctly implemented in CambridgeTestInterface.js (lines 1273-1540)
note_completion: Renders input fields with proper gap fill pattern (___N___)
true_false_not_given: Renders radio buttons for TRUE/FALSE/NOT GIVEN options
section_matching: Renders dropdown selects with A-H options
matching_features: Renders researcher list and dropdown selects for matching
sentence_completion: Renders input fields for completing sentences
multiple_choice: Renders radio buttons with A/B/C/D options
yes_no_not_given: Renders radio buttons for YES/NO/NOT GIVEN options
summary_completion: Renders word box and dropdown selects within summary text
Navigation bar at bottom correctly shows Part 1 (Q1-13), Part 2 (Q14-26), Part 3 (Q27-40)
P1/P2/P3 buttons allow switching between passages

test_credentials.note: User plan is 'free' in database, but localStorage was set to 'pro' for testing

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Cambridge IELTS 17 Test 2 data from test2.py

Test URL: /cambridge-test/ielts17/test2?skill=reading. Login requires setting localStorage user object with pro plan.
